category_sources: source_facts.description says it exports and inspects the local iMessage database; official repository describes exporting iMessage data and diagnostics.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository uses the display name iMessage Exporter; source_facts.name provides the package identifier imessage-exporter.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface for imessage-exporter.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has an official repository URL, so repo discovery was skipped per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official repository describe local iMessage database export/inspection on macOS.
